detectors.description:
Reentrancy in FIFAPE.openTrading() (FIFAPE.sol#559-585):
	External calls:
	- uniswapV2Pair = IUniswapV2Factory(_uniswapV2Router.factory()).createPair(address(this),_uniswapV2Router.WETH()) (FIFAPE.sol#569)
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (FIFAPE.sol#571)
	External calls sending eth:
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (FIFAPE.sol#571)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- tradingOpen = true (FIFAPE.sol#581)
	FIFAPE.tradingOpen (FIFAPE.sol#273) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- FIFAPE.openTrading() (FIFAPE.sol#559-585)

	- [uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp)](FIFAPE.sol#L571)
	External calls sending eth:
	- [uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp)](FIFAPE.sol#L571)
	State variables written after the call(s):

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in FIFAPE._transfer(address,address,uint256) (FIFAPE.sol#431-489):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (FIFAPE.sol#471)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (FIFAPE.sol#503-515)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (FIFAPE.sol#477)
		- _feeAddrWallet.transfer(amount) (FIFAPE.sol#553)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (FIFAPE.sol#487)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (FIFAPE.sol#641)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (FIFAPE.sol#621)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (FIFAPE.sol#623)
	FIFAPE._rOwned (FIFAPE.sol#233) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- FIFAPE._takeTeam(uint256) (FIFAPE.sol#635-643)
	- FIFAPE._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (FIFAPE.sol#617-631)
	- FIFAPE.balanceOf(address) (FIFAPE.sol#349-353)
	- FIFAPE.constructor() (FIFAPE.sol#299-313)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (FIFAPE.sol#487)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (FIFAPE.sol#649)
	FIFAPE._rTotal (FIFAPE.sol#249) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- FIFAPE._getCurrentSupply() (FIFAPE.sol#741-751)
	- FIFAPE._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (FIFAPE.sol#647-653)
	- FIFAPE.constructor() (FIFAPE.sol#299-313)
	- FIFAPE.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (FIFAPE.sol#405-413)

detectors.description:
Version constraint ^0.8.4 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)

	- MissingSideEffectsOnSelectorAccess
	- AbiReencodingHeadOverflowWithStaticArrayCleanup
	- DirtyBytesArrayToStorage
	- DataLocationChangeInInternalOverride
	- NestedCalldataArrayAbiReencodingSizeValidation
	- SignedImmutables.
It is used by:
	- ^0.8.4 (FIFAPE.sol#13)
